ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Courgette or zucchini, flesh and skin, raw
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: bolognese sauce (62%)[water, vegetables {onion, mushrooms (3%), cauliflower (3%), carrots (2%)}, toma paste, tomatoes {tomatoes, food acid (citric), firming agent (calcium chloride)}, roast vegetable mix (eggpla (1%), zucchini, red capsicum (1%), yellow capsicum), green lentils (2%), red lentils (1%), raw sugar, salt, vegetable oil, garlic, herbs, yeast extract (natural flavour), starch, spices, paprika extract, chilli, food ac (citric)],green pea pasta (23%)[water, green pea flou vegetable mix [butternut pumpkin (4%), spinach (4%) carrots (4%), red capsicum (4%)]
